author: Ricky
msg:
What is the function of wallet settings on UNO dashboard?

1. If we revoke a license, it doesn’t go back to wallet settings.
2. There is no tab as bulk change for wallet settings. Bulk changes has only edit, settings, generate or revoke lease. So if one/ few/ all licenses have some settings (by leasing out / revoking / bulk change), they stay with the license.


So, is wallet setting is ONLY to be applied on each license individually? If yes, it’s not worth having this feature.

author: flipwip
msg:
I sent my node to a different wallet and had to re verify in Discord. Also not that any rewards will be tied to old wallet address. When you move you start from Zero rewards in new wallet. You also lose all the Aliases you may have assigned to your ULO's.

Couple things to consider ahead of transferring.

Asked the team if they can move my UP's from old to new wallet and it was not possible.

author: Noto Nodes
msg: Hi friends. A little late to the party here, but I spent some time going through the AMA and thought I’d share a few observations for anyone catching up. I might not have interpreted everything perfectly, but this is what stood out to me.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#1
Telemetry rewards are not being removed

Quote
“Your existing telemetry tasks will continue to run as normal.”

And later:

“rewards for normal devices will restore in due course as recalibration completes”  

Takeaway
The base telemetry layer still exists. Current low rewards are part of the recalibration phase, not a confirmed permanent change to the reward model.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#2
The recalibration is tied to abuse detection

Quote
“We had a case where over a number of ULO licenses there were literally more than 10,000 proxies being run.”

Takeaway
The team discovered large-scale synthetic setups using proxies, VPNs and rented IP ranges. Recalibration is intended to remove synthetic data and rebalance rewards toward real devices.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#3
Customers pushed for network cleanup

Quote
“When customers see 10,000 VPN clients over a network… this is a scary sight for a customer.”

Takeaway
Enterprise partners apparently raised concerns about the authenticity of telemetry data. Cleaning the network is necessary to maintain credibility with telecom clients.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#4
Rewards for legitimate setups should return

Quote
“You can expect rewards for normal devices that are not synthetic… to restore in due course.”

Takeaway
The expectation set by the team is that legitimate devices should see rewards return once recalibration is finished.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#5
No confirmed timeline for recalibration

Quote
“It could be seven to ten more days… it could be four days.”

Takeaway
There is no firm date for when recalibration will end.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#6
SMS and CLI tasks already have contracts

Quote
“Contracts are already in place… the customer simply hasn’t started the volume yet.”

Takeaway
The team claims the upcoming SMS and CLI tasks already have commercial agreements. The missing piece right now is volume activation by customers.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#7
Scout & Runner is seen as a major revenue opportunity

Quote
“The impact can be enormous… very valuable to telecom carriers.”

Takeaway
The team is prioritising Scout & Runner because they believe it could generate significant telecom testing demand.

author: Noto Nodes
msg:
#8
Many additional tasks are planned

Quote
“I think there are about 60 tasks planned for the network.”

and:

“one third-party task will have insane volume”


Takeaway
Unity intends to expand beyond telemetry into a broader multi-task edge network, though most of these tasks are still roadmap items.

author: L .
msg:
Gotcha!  Yea, like all of us, I’m just waiting for all the hype to come to sustainable fruition…

I hear it’s a magnificent place, where we no longer have to ask for clarity around “soon”, “wen”, or be traumatized by polls.  No longer have ULOs leaving due to negligent incentives.  Where leases are drained from the market place with ULOs who stay connected, do plenty of scouting, running, & perform active tasks.. It’s a place where we have bountiful CLI, SMS, & WIFI tasks, where small farms of legit devices & individual license operators contribute value to the network!

All we as UNO’s need to do, is scroll through the leased portion to all green dots, send out a bulk message or 2, and make withdrawals above $150.

I hear it’s coming, just can’t wait to get there…😎🙌🏾
